title: SpectateHaze's Vanilla+
description: A Client Side modpack that includes performance enhancing mods alongside many quality of life mods
body:
SpectateHaze's Vanilla+ is a Client Side modpack that spices up your Minecraft experience with a mix of performance boosting mods and handy tweaks. It keeps the game close to its original feel while making it run smoother and adding some nifty features to make your life easier. This modpack is also designed for pvp in addition to being a vanilla modpack so feel free to use it for pvp!

**Please note that certain mods in this pack, such as freecam mod, replay mod, and elytra/chestplate swapper mod, may provide an unfair advantage over other players, which may be bannable on some servers. Use them at your own risk!**
